# CurXor

> Sovereign 64GB AI appliance. Mint autonomous digital employees on bare metal.

## Product

- Name: curXor (chassis name on every box)
- Company: CurXor Systems
- Price: $3,999 USD (one-time pre-order, no monthly API fees)
- Primary CTA: Join waitlist at https://curxor.ai/#subscribe
- Homepage story: Act I (Flagship + Forge) · Meet the Operators (X-ready share lines) · Act II horizon tease + Cafe proof
- Compute: AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395, 64GB LPDDR5X UMA, 126 TOPS NPU
- Dual 10GbE: eno1 Command Port (UI), eno2 Egress Port (agent outbound — unplug to kill agents)
- Software: CurXor OS 0.9.1 with 9 Claw verticals + The Forge (enable any combination in Settings)
- QA: 180 smoke + 40 user-flow checks in curxor-os (qa:local suite)
- Hardware validation: MS-S1 MAX silicon benchmarks in progress — no public bench log until green
- Messaging: Telegram, Slack, WhatsApp, iMessage gateways — user-configured; unified inbox on appliance
- Category: Independent computer for digital employees — OpenClaw engine, turnkey Flight Command UI
- Pre-order (secondary): https://buy.stripe.com/00w4gzb5U6gKc6igCZabK00

## Claw depth tiers (honest labels)

- Flagship: Capital Claw, Creator Claw, Outreach Claw — demo-ready desks, Go Live paths, eno2 bridges
- Forge: The Forge — natural-language agent factory
- Cafe: Engage Claw route — cross-Claw growth home (XP, streaks, ascension from real activity)
- Preview: Arbitrage, Signal, Swarm, Vital, Kin — working shells; local data OK; production depth ships later

## Key differentiators vs Mac Studio + Ollama

- Turnkey agent platform (not DIY inference only)
- Bundled Claws with honest depth tiers — Flagship · Forge · Cafe · Preview
- Capital Claw (Flagship): demo tour, Go Live desk, rule engine, paper/live Alpaca on eno2
- Creator Claw (Flagship): Creation Wizard, Go Live, publish bridges, engage loop, planner/analytics
- Outreach Claw (Flagship): L1–L3 persona levels, sequences, deliverability, approval flows, analytics
- Claw Cafe (Cafe tier): cross-Claw XP and ascension — reads real Flagship events
- Preview modules: Arbitrage, Signal, Swarm, Vital, Kin — honest preview shells, no fake Go Live
- Physical eno2 kill switch for outbound agents
- Zero per-token cloud API fees

## vs Perplexity Personal Computer

- Perplexity Max (~$200/mo) orchestrates frontier models in the cloud on your Mac
- CurXor: $3,999 once, local inference on appliance hardware, bundled Claw verticals, eno2 kill switch

## vs OpenClaw DIY / ClawBox / NemoClaw

- OpenClaw: free agent runtime — you supply hardware, skills, security, and integrations
- ClawBox-class Jetson (~€549, 8GB): lightweight always-on assistants
- NVIDIA NemoClaw: alpha governance layer for DIY OpenClaw on NVIDIA hardware
- CurXor: turnkey independent computer — OpenClaw engine + Flight Command + 10 Claws + Forge on 64GB UMA; unified messaging (Telegram, Slack, WhatsApp, iMessage) and CCP inbox; wearables user-configured

## vs MIKY / agent NAS boxes

- MIKY-class and Minisforum NAS-style boxes: independent computers for agents — messaging, calendar, general automation
- CurXor: same independence narrative with 64GB UMA, 126 TOPS, wealth/work/life Claws, messaging gateways, eno1/eno2 kill switch, The Forge to customize anything
